title: FurfSky Legacy
description: A texture pack replacing newer FurfSky Reborn textures with older ones (with permission from the artists of course).
body:
This project is dead. The actual FurfSky pack has begun adding legacy textures in its recent updates, so mine has no purpose. Download it [here](https://modrinth.com/project/khMbd0K1).

All this texture pack does is replace the new textures in the FurfSky Reborn texture packs with old beloved textures. Current changes in the **MOST RECENT** version of the pack include:
- Wither Blades
- Wither Armor Sets
- Final Destination Set
- Juju Shortbow
- Terminator
- E-Man Slayer Katanas
- Raw Soulflow
- Soulflow
- Soulflow Pile
- Soulflow Battery
- Soulflow Supercell
- Soul Esoward (I think, it might've not been retextured)
- Judgement Core
- Gyrokinetic Wand
- Transmission Tuner
- Axe/Halberd of The Shredded
- Reaper Falchion
- Revenant Falchion
- Undead Sword
- Giant Sword
- Shadow Fury
- Livid Dagger
- Divan's Armor
- Healing Zombie Swords
- Skeleton Dungeon Sets (Grunt, Lord, Master, Soldier)
- Conjuring
- Silent Death
- Zombie Soldier Cutlass
- Dreadlord Sword
- Crypt Witherlord Sword
- Rogue Sword
- Midas Sword + Staff
- Dark Claymore

This pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) and [NEU](https://modrinth.com/project/GGamhqbw) on 1.8 and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) and [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/project/IJNUBZ2a) on 1.21.5+

This pack is an overlay and there are no plans to make it a full version.

If you plan to use this pack on 1.21.5+ in conjuction with the original pack, you need to delete the helmet textures in the original pack. Even if the original pack is under this one, their helmet textures will override this ones.

If you find any issues with this pack or want to suggest any changes please ping me in the FurfSky Rebron discord server (invite is under "links") in the "FSR Overlays for legacy textures" thread in the "feedback-and-support" channel (the thread should be pinned). Or you can just dm me. My discord is @Mayo756. 

This is a non-profit creation. If you wish to go throw your money at something go do so at the actual talented artists of the original FurfSky texture packs [here](https://modrinth.com/project/khMbd0K1).
